feature.name: Flexible
feature.text: +1 to Evasion

feature.name: Heavy
feature.text: -1 to Evasion

feature.name: Very Heavy
feature.text: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility

feature.name: Flexible
feature.text: +1 to Evasion

feature.name: Heavy
feature.text: -1 to Evasion

feature.name: Very Heavy
feature.text: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility

feature.name: Warded
feature.text: You reduce incoming magic damage by your Armor Score before applying it to your damage thresholds.

feature.name: Resilient
feature.text: Before you mark your last Armor Slot, roll a d6. On a result of 6, reduce the severity by one threshold without marking an Armor Slot.

feature.name: Reinforced
feature.text: When you mark your last Armor Slot, increase your damage thresholds by +2 until you clear at least 1 Armor Slot.

feature.name: Shifting
feature.text: When you are targeted for an attack, you can mark an Armor Slot to give the attack roll against you disadvantage.

feature.name: Quiet
feature.text: You gain a +2 bonus to rolls you make to move silently.

feature.name: Hopeful
feature.text: When you would spend a Hope, you can mark an Armor Slot instead.

feature.name: Flexible
feature.text: +1 to Evasion

feature.name: Heavy
feature.text: -1 to Evasion

feature.name: Very Heavy
feature.text: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility

feature.name: Gilded
feature.text: +1 to Presence

feature.name: Impenetrable
feature.text: Once per short rest, when you would mark your last Hit Point, you can instead mark a Stress.

feature.name: Sharp
feature.text: On a successful attack against a target within Melee range, add a d4 to the damage roll.

feature.name: Physical
feature.text: You can't mark an Armor Slot to reduce magic damage.

feature.name: Magic
feature.text: You can't mark an Armor Slot to reduce physical damage.

feature.name: Painful
feature.text: Each time you mark an Armor Slot, you must mark a Stress.

feature.name: Flexible
feature.text: +1 to Evasion

feature.name: Heavy
feature.text: -1 to Evasion

feature.name: Very Heavy
feature.text: -2 to Evasion; -1 to Agility

feature.name: Timeslowing
feature.text: Mark an Armor Slot to roll a d4 and add its result as a bonus to your Evasion against an incoming attack.

feature.name: Channeling
feature.text: +1 to Spellcast Rolls

feature.name: Burning
feature.text: When an adversary attacks you within Melee range, they mark a Stress.

feature.name: Fortified
feature.text: When you mark an Armor Slot, you reduce the severity of an attack by two thresholds instead of one.

feature.name: Truthseeking
feature.text: This armor glows when another creature within Close range tells a lie.

feature.name: Difficult
feature.text: -1 to all character traits and Evasion
